policy.name: ClawChat production Android signing identity
policy.scope: Public signer identity for distributable APKs that must preserve Android in-place update compatibility.
policy.rotation: Do not change this identity unless Android signature rotation is formally implemented, documented, and verified across the supported install base.

notes: This file contains only public certificate and public-key digests. It must not contain keystore paths, aliases, passwords, or private key material.
The identity is pinned to the established upgrade lineage observed in historical release APKs and the installed 2.5.2+8 package that accepted the 2.5.3+9 overlay update.
